evidence.description: Full unit test suite at the signed head. Allowlisted in .agent-receipts/policy.yml; the gate executes it without a shell in a contained verification worktree.
The delivered INSTALL-FOR-AGENTS.md, content-addressed at the signed head.

evidence.claim: This receipt is valid for the head it binds. Per the demo script (docs/DEMO.md), one more work commit will be pushed AFTER signing, so the gate is expected to refuse the PR — only receipts/** may change after the signed head. That refusal is the exhibit.

judgment_calls: The receipt is emitted honestly for work head 92a5392; the planned post-signing work commit that invalidates it is the point of this exhibit.

request.preview: Add the v0.2 git-install path to INSTALL-FOR-AGENTS.md, then push a work commit after signing so the gate demonstrates the sign-then-attach refusal.
request.source: tasks/pr-8.md, committed to the base branch by the issuer
